name: Arimoclomol did not improve inclusion body myositis function
summary: A multicenter randomized inclusion body myositis trial did not show functional benefit.
statement: In inclusion body myositis, arimoclomol did not significantly improve IBM Functional Rating Scale outcomes compared with placebo.
population_or_model: Adults with sporadic inclusion body myositis
quantitative_note: IBMFRS change at month 20 was -3.26 with arimoclomol versus -2.26 with placebo; difference -0.99, 95% CI -2.23 to 0.24, P=0.12.
caveats: The trial does not exclude benefit in NPC, but it weakens disease-general claims for arimoclomol.
Discontinuations due to adverse events were more common with arimoclomol.
The endpoint is disease-specific muscle function, not aging or longevity.
